# [JAR Dependency Statements](#jar-dependency-statements)

Statements for managing Maven/JAR dependencies declared in a module‚Äôs settings.
These map to the **Module Settings ‚Üí Java dependencies** tab in Studio Pro and
are stored as `Projects$JarDependency` entries in `Projects$ModuleSettings`.

| Statement | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [ALTER MODULE ‚Ä¶ JAR DEPENDENCY](#alter-module--jar-dependency) | Add, update, or remove JAR dependencies |
| [LIST / DESCRIBE JAR DEPENDENCY](#list--describe-jar-dependency) | List or inspect JAR dependencies |
